scripts.ts:clone:check: npm run ts:clone:drift && npm run ts:clone:guard
scripts.build:systems:verify: npm run build:systems && npm run build:systems:smoke
scripts.ops:race-queue:hardening: npm run -s ops:package-manifest:check && npm run -s ops:command-registry:check && npm run -s ops:entrypoint-contract:check && npm run -s ops:dependency-boundary:check && npm run -s ops:formal-spec:check && npm run -s ops:state-tiering:check && npm run -s ops:path-contract:check && npm run -s ops:docs-surface:check && npm run -s ops:root-surface:check && npm run -s ops:source-runtime:check && npm run -s ops:legal-language:check && npm run -s ops:ci-workflow:check && npm run -s ops:ci-quality:check
scripts.ops:kernel-layer-matrix: cargo test -p kernel_layers --no-default-features --features layer0 && cargo test -p kernel_layers --no-default-features --features layer2 && cargo test -p kernel_layers
scripts.ops:rust50:conf-003:run: node client/systems/ops/rust50_sprint1_batch.js run --enforcer-active=1 --preamble-text="ENFORCER RULES ACTIVE — READ codex_enforcer.md FIRST." --strict=1 --apply=1
scripts.ops:rust50:conf-004:run: node client/systems/ops/rust50_sprint1_batch.js run --policy=client/config/rust50_mega_sprint1_batch_policy.json --enforcer-active=1 --preamble-text="ENFORCER RULES ACTIVE — READ codex_enforcer.md FIRST." --strict=1 --apply=1
scripts.coverage:rust: mkdir -p coverage && rustup component add llvm-tools-preview >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && cargo llvm-cov -p conduit -p ipc -p storage -p update --ignore-run-fail --summary-only > coverage/rust-summary.txt -- --skip hosted_roundtrip_budget_under_5ms --skip embedded_stdio_budget_under_20ms
scripts.coverage:all: npm run -s coverage:ts && npm run -s coverage:rust && npm run -s coverage:merge
scripts.ops:conduit:edge-matrix: cargo test -p conduit --no-default-features && cargo test -p conduit --no-default-features --features edge
scripts.ops:test:protheus-ops-core:attention: npm run -s ops:host-build-stale:check || npm run -s ops:host-build-stale:reap && node client/systems/ops/host_rust_validation.js run --profile=protheus_ops_attention
scripts.ops:test:execution-core:initiative: npm run -s ops:host-build-stale:check || npm run -s ops:host-build-stale:reap && node client/systems/ops/host_rust_validation.js run --profile=execution_core_initiative

name: openclaw
description: Personal automation and orchestration toolkit for macOS/Linux workflows.
